2026-02-26T19:25:11.9353839Z 
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9354101Z - Fix incorrect pnpm install command: `npm install -g @pnpm` -> `npm install -g pnpm`
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9354555Z   The package name on npm is `pnpm`, not `@pnpm`.
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9355043Z - Update Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md examples to use vitest instead of mocha/chai:
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9355674Z   - Replace `import { assert } from "chai"` with vitest imports in both example files
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9356297Z   - Replace `import { Context } from "mocha"` with `import type { TestInfo } from "@azure-tools/test-recorder"`
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9357162Z   - Update `createRecorder` function signature to use `TestInfo` instead of mocha `Context`
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9357781Z   - Update `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` to `new Recorder(context)`
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9358325Z   - Update `beforeEach` callbacks to use vitest-style arrow functions with `ctx` parameter
2026-02-26T19:25:11.9358674Z
